title: handoff.json
description: Per-item, append-only structured cross-phase channel (plan-draft3 §File Contract, D13). Replaces free-form progress.md as the contract surface between phases. User-injected context from the dashboard lands here as entries.user_injected_context (D43). The harness writes entries; agents read. Item ID matches whatever the stage's items_id expression extracts (Issue 2).

item_id.description: Item identifier as extracted by the stage's items_id expression. No pattern enforced by the harness (Issue 2).

parent_session_id.description: Session chain link for -c continuation (plan-draft3 §Protocol: token usage).

intended_files.description: Files the implementer intended to modify. Used by reviewers to detect incidental churn.

deferred_criteria.description: Acceptance criteria the implementer consciously deferred with a reason.

reviewer_notes_seen.description: Reviewer note identifiers the implementer has explicitly read (seeded from prior review rounds).

user_injected_context.description: Set by the dashboard when the user injects context for the next session of this feature (D43). Consumed on the next session start.

failure_summary.description: Written by the harness when escalating to retry_mode=fresh_with_failure_summary (plan-draft3 §Retry).

queued_by.description: Always the single local user (plan-draft3 D57); present for audit only.
